_note: PLACEHOLDER — Daria provides real values from https://hokuto.leaplyhub.com/message-matrix?account=A7_Leaply. Used as fallback taxonomy for fit-check. Replace with real export before live demo.

core_messages.name: Aging Is Not the Cause
core_messages.description: Reframes age-related symptoms as fixable, not inevitable.
examples: You're not getting old — your lymph is blocked.
Stop blaming age for what's actually fixable.

core_messages.name: Blocked Lymph Flow
core_messages.description: Positions blocked lymph as the root cause of swelling, pain, and aging.
examples: Your lymph nodes are blocked.
Lymph stagnation is silently aging your body.

core_messages.name: Body Transformation
core_messages.description: Visual before/after promise, body-level change in weeks.
examples: See the change in 14 days.
From bloated to slim — without diets.

core_messages.name: Doctor Knows the Secret
core_messages.description: Authority figure reveals what mainstream medicine hides.
examples: Doctors won't tell you this.
What your physiotherapist isn't telling you.

core_messages.name: Natural Method
core_messages.description: No pills, no surgery — just simple daily ritual.
examples: 3 minutes a day. No pills.
The natural way they don't want you to know.

core_messages.name: Energy Restoration
core_messages.description: Fatigue as symptom of stagnant lymph; promise of returning energy.
examples: Wake up actually rested.
Get back the energy you had at 25.

core_messages.name: Relative-as-Proof
core_messages.description: Family member transformation as social proof.
examples: My mom did this for 30 days...
I gave it to my husband who scoffed — now he won't shut up about it.

core_messages.name: Fast Pain Relief
core_messages.description: Immediate physical relief as primary value prop.
examples: Neck pain gone in 5 minutes.
Plantar fasciitis — finally something that works.

core_messages.name: Self-Care Ritual
core_messages.description: Positions product as moment for self, not obligation.
examples: The 5-min ritual that's saving my sanity.
Your daily reset.

core_messages.name: Scientific Authority
examples: Studies show 87% improvement in...
Lymphology research finally confirms...

core_messages.name: Urgency / Before It's Too Late
core_messages.description: Warns of progressive damage if ignored.
examples: By 50, it's irreversible.
Don't wait until you can't fix it.

core_messages.name: Confidence Through Appearance
core_messages.description: Better look → social confidence → life change.
examples: Walked into the room differently.
First time I felt seen in years.

core_messages.name: Posture-Confidence Loop
core_messages.description: Bad posture limits opportunities; fixing posture changes life.
examples: Your neck hump is killing your confidence.
Posture before product.

pain_points.name: general
pain_points.description: Generic wellness / low energy / vague malaise

pain_points.name: legs
pain_points.description: Leg swelling, heavy legs, varicose feel

pain_points.name: plantar fasciitis
pain_points.description: Foot pain, especially morning, heel sharp pain

pain_points.name: neck hump
pain_points.description: Buffalo hump / dowager hump, visible from side

visual_formats.name: Professional Authority
visual_formats.description: Doctor / expert in clinical setting, lab coat, authoritative gaze

visual_formats.name: Native UGC
visual_formats.description: Selfie-style, bedroom/kitchen background, raw lighting, real-person feel

visual_formats.name: Social Interaction
visual_formats.description: Two people conversation, one teaching/advising the other

visual_formats.name: Action / Demo
visual_formats.description: Showing the technique or product in use, hands-focused

visual_formats.name: Screen / Phone Reveal
visual_formats.description: Pointing at phone screen showing comments/reviews/studies

hook_types.name: Problem-reveal
hook_types.description: Names a hidden problem viewer didn't know they had

hook_types.name: Pattern interrupt
hook_types.description: Unexpected visual or statement to stop scrolling

hook_types.name: Question hook
hook_types.description: Opens with provocative question to viewer
